summary: Iteration 62: Tested 25 templates, marketplace reviews, template flow fix. Fixed critical bug in /app/lib/templates.js where template literal ${} expressions were being evaluated at parse time causing ReferenceError. All 13 backend API tests pass. Frontend login blocked by Supabase auth - test user may not exist in Supabase.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot login with testprov@test.com - Supabase auth returns no error but doesn't redirect to dashboard. Test user may not exist in Supabase.

action_items: Verify test user testprov@test.com exists in Supabase auth with password password123
If user doesn't exist, create it via Supabase dashboard or seed script
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /app/lib/templates.js had unescaped ${} expressions inside template literals causing ReferenceError at parse time. Fixed by escaping $ as \$ for: ${p.price}, ${(item.qty * item.rate).toLocaleString()}, ${val.toLocaleString()}, ${item.price * item.qty}, ${cartTotal}, ${item.price}, ${orderTotal}, ${l.price}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working. GET /api/templates now returns 25 templates (5 per category). Fixed template literal escaping bug. Frontend testing blocked by Supabase auth - need valid test user credentials.

code_verification.templates_api: GET /api/templates returns 25 templates with correct categories (Marketing, Business, Personal, Content, Commerce) - 5 each
code_verification.marketplace_api: GET /api/marketplace returns empty array (no published templates yet), POST endpoints require auth
code_verification.reviews_api: GET /api/marketplace/:id/reviews returns empty array, POST requires auth
code_verification.share_api: POST /api/projects/:id/share requires auth, accepts expires_in param
code_verification.NewProjectModal: Has 25 BUILT_IN_TEMPLATES, category filter buttons (all, Marketing, Business, Personal, Content, Commerce), Templates/Marketplace/Publish tabs, rating display for marketplace templates
code_verification.RightPanel: Has share expiry picker with options: never, 1h, 24h, 7d, 30d
code_verification.DeployTab: Has startPolling function for deployment status polling
code_verification.GrowthPanel: Has schedule state with enabled toggle and frequency selector
code_verification.Dashboard.createProject: Fixed to fetch files from backend after template creation (lines 769-784)
